summary: Habit tracker app with Internet Identity login, dashboard, add/edit/delete habits, daily/weekly frequency, streak tracking, and clean modern UI. Currently fixing dashboard data loading issue.
architectural_notes: Built with Tailwind CSS for styling
known_issues: Dashboard cannot load data - habits and streaks not displaying

existing_features.title: Fix the dashboard page so that habit progress bars, today's stats cards, and activity timeline all load and display data correctly without remaining blank or failing to fetch.

Ensure the React Query hooks used by DashboardPage (habits query, activities query, user profile query) correctly call the backend actor and handle loading/error states gracefully, showing a spinner or fallback UI instead of a blank screen while data is being fetched.

Verify and fix the useActor hook integration in the dashboard context so the actor is fully initialized before any dashboard queries execute, preventing null/undefined actor calls that silently return no data.
